title: senecio squalidus var. rupestris
intro: Senecio squalidus var. rupestris, also known as the mountain sneak or blue rock Senecio, is a biennial plant belonging to the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can be attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and alkaloids. The health benefits of Senecio squalidus var. rupestris include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
